descriptionTemplate: Gain [Arg1] Keyflare. Choose 1 card from the Draw Pile or Discard Pile, add it to your hand, and reduce its Arithmetica Cost to 0.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Keyflare. Choose 1 card from the Draw Pile or Discard Pile and add it to your hand, reducing its Arithmetica Cost to 0. Shuffle 1 {Insight} into the Draw Pile.
